items.name: [PBR] Fallen Wings: Violet Wings of Bat Glory
items.description:
Cloaked in deep violet shades, these wings carry the essence of the night. Forged with the spirit of the bat, they embody agility, mystery, and silent dominance. Every flap echoes with the power of creatures that rule the dark skies, marking their bearer as one who thrives in shadows.

Price: 1000/11 Stock
Purchase Game: https://www.roblox.com/games/73736600148167
